theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

narrative.summary: Micron: 정량 종합 67점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 51 / 중기 68 / 장기 76. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 과열
overheat.guidance: 조정(10~15% 하락) 기다리는 게 안전. 지금은 관망.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 8.4% → 2-ATR 손절폭 16.7%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 3개 시그널 합류 — Value Area High, Fib 0.5, Swing High. 현재가 대비 +35.9% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $469.3 아래 손절가 $376.1 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: AvalonBay, Equity Residential Said to Near Mega-REIT Tie-Up
top_news.summary: AvalonBay Communities Inc. and Equity Residential are nearing a deal that will see two of the biggest real estate investment trusts by value combine, people familiar with the matter said.

top_news.title: Gold Steadies as Hopes of US-Iran Truce Lower Odds of Rate Hikes
top_news.summary: Gold was little changed as optimism over efforts to end the Middle East conflict eased bets on interest-rate hikes.

top_news.title: SpaceX Filing Reveals $4.28 Billion Loss, Musk’s Tight Grip
top_news.summary: SpaceX filed publicly for what stands to be the largest-ever initial public offering, revealing billions in losses and the super-voting share plan allowing Elon Musk to keep the rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence giant under his control.

top_news.title: Oil Edges Up After Plunging on Optimism Over US-Iran Agreement
top_news.summary: Oil inched higher after plummeting on Wednesday, as President Donald Trump said the US is in the “final stages” with Iran.

top_news.title: Musk Ally Antonio Gracias Stands to Make Billions Off SpaceX Bet
top_news.summary: Antonio Gracias, the founder of Valor Equity Partners and a longtime Elon Musk ally, controls a 7.3% stake in SpaceX, making him the second-largest holder after Musk himself that will earn the investor a giant windfall.

top_news.title: Asian Stocks to Rise as Nvidia Whipsaws on Results: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Asian equities were set to climb Thursday after gains on Wall Street that reflected a constructive outlook for US-Iran talks. Nvidia Corp. shares whipsawed in a lukewarm response to rising data center sales.

top_news.title: Samsung, TSMC Spur Reality Check After Historic AI Stock Boom
top_news.summary: Samsung and TSMC are leading a historic AI stock boom reshaping Korea and Taiwan. It's also raising questions about who benefits.

top_news.title: Scion Group & Ares Management Team Up to Buy $910M in Student Housing
top_news.summary: Scion Group CEO Rob Bronstein said that his team is targeting real estate around universities that represent a 'strong return on investment' in terms of tuition, as his company announces a deal with Ares Management to but  $910M in student housing properties. Bronstein, joined by Bloomberg's Norah Mulinda, said that his investment is aimed at providing a wide net of locations and price points in the student housing market.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: SEC Chief Atkins Pumps the Brakes on Prediction-Market Funds
top_news.summary: The top US securities regulator is delaying the launch of a wave of novel exchange-traded funds that would let investors wager on events such as elections and economic data as the agency weighs how far the $15 trillion ETF wrapper can stretch.

top_news.title: Reeves to Set Out UK Cost of Living Plan to Cushion Iran War Hit
top_news.summary: Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves will detail a package of measures to ease cost-of-living pressures on Thursday, as the British government tries to limit the impact of the Iran war.
